positive: A cyberpunk cityscape vista bathed in neon rain. High contrast, deep saturation, dominated by glowing magenta, cyan, and electric blue. Futuristic architecture, detailed wires, flying vehicles, synthwave aesthetic, cinematic depth of field, vector art quality.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, watercolor, soft lighting, natural elements
